message:
feat(message): add read and ack commands for unified messaging (ntm-i5nz)

- Add Read method to UnifiedMessenger to retrieve messages by unified ID
- Add Ack method to acknowledge messages by unified ID
- Add `ntm message read <msg-id>` CLI command
- Add `ntm message ack <msg-id>` CLI command
- Unified IDs support both Agent Mail (am-123) and BD (bd-456) formats

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
